description: Tool invocation protocols for tools[].protocol (SPECIFICATION §G). This registry is intentionally small and changes rarely; new protocols require Standards Action (a new minor version of the core schema) because every conforming runtime must understand them.

entries.meaning: In-process callable; parameters_schema forwarded to the model's function-calling API.
Model Context Protocol; endpoint is mcp://<server>/<resource> or a transport URI.
Raw REST; endpoint is the full URL.
OpenAPI 3.x spec; endpoint points at the spec.
